hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "[Console]::OutputEncoding=[System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $d=$env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; $ac = Join-Path $d '_artifacts/_home/active-context.md'; Write-Output '# Home-base continuity + gate (auto-injected at SessionStart)'; if (Test-Path $ac) { Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $ac }; Write-Output ''; Write-Output 'ARTIFACTS GATE: no edits outside _artifacts/ without an approved implementation_plan.md (see AGENTS.md section 3). GIT: hand Daniel the exact command; never commit/push yourself unless he delegates it in the moment (git-policy).'; $rm = Join-Path $d '_docs/repo-map.md'; if (Test-Path $rm) { Write-Output ''; Write-Output '# Repo map (navigation index):'; Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 $rm }"
